violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the potato cutter were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was placed in warewashing area to be cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Pickled jalapenos, pickled fruit salsa were observed stored beyond 7 days. Per interview of staff, food items are acidified to pH 3.9 or lower. Foods are also kept refrigerated. Acidification of these foods ((C) Using FOOD ADDITIVES or adding components such as vinegar: (1) As a method of FOOD preservation rather than as a method of flavor enhancement, Pf or (2) To render a FOOD so that it is not TIME/TEMPERATURE CONTROL OF SAFETY FOOD;) require approval. Plans to be submitted to RIDOH. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the interior of chest freezer, bottom of prep table lowboy, and wall near oven have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The door to the employee's toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2022
Several ceiling tiles in the back storage room were observed with water damage or missing. Physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025
